extraction.one_line_summary: DOWSETT Alex escaped solo from a 6-rider breakaway with a second attack on the final climb, holding 1+ minute to win stage 8.
tactical_patterns: DOWSETT's second attack from breakaway on final categorized climb exploited hesitation from chase group to build decisive gap.
Trek-Segafredo forced peloton despite 10+ minute gap suggesting team disruption tactics rather than genuine chase of break.
Six-rider breakaway composition too strong for peloton to control; multiple GC teams let skilled TTer escape on lumpy stage.

rider_signals.DOWSETT Alex: positive: Won from breakaway showing climbing sufficient for lumpy stages despite being primarily a time trialist, contract-year motivation evident.
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: neutral: Collected 2 intermediate sprint points at 100km mark extending maglia ciclamino lead, strategic positioning continuing.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: Retained 43-second pink jersey lead over Bilbao without incident on transition stage before mountain weekend.
rider_signals.GASTAUER Ben: negative: Crashed out as 14th abandonment in 8 stages, signaling peloton attrition rate affecting team depth.
